rulings.Case Title: IN RE: THE BENUSTO BARNACHEA NAPENAS LIVING TRUST DATED JANUARY 20, 2006 (TRUST), WHICH BECAME IRREVOCABLE ON THE DEA
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Compelling Answers To Form Interrogatories Propounded To Juana Napenas And Deeming Requests For Admissions Admitted
rulings.Rulings: Matter on calendar for Thursday, September 13, 2007. 1) Trustee Zosima Dizon's motion to compel responses to form interrogatories and for an order to deem certain matters admitted as to trust contestant Juana Napenas is granted in part and denied in part. The Court has considered the late-filed opposition. The motion is granted as to the form interrogatories. The motion is denied as to the requests for admission as responses have been served. Trust contestant is ordered to provide complete verified responses without objection within 15 days of notice of this order. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $540 are to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. = (610/BEC)

rulings.Case Title: IN RE: THE BENUSTO BARNACHEA NAPENAS LIVING TRUST DATED JANUARY 20, 2006 (TRUST), WHICH BECAME IRREVOCABLE ON THE DEA
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion Of Zosima Bumatay Mulato Dizon To Strike Unverified Trust Contest Of Carlito Quismorio And Juana Napenas; Points And Authorities And Request For Judicial Notice
rulings.Rulings: Motion denied. Defect corrected with filing of verified petition.

rulings.Case Title: IN RE: THE BENUSTO BARNACHEA NAPENAS LIVING TRUST DATED JANUARY 20, 2006 (TRUST), WHICH BECAME IRREVOCABLE ON THE DEA
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Compelling Further Answers To Form Interrogatories Propounded To Carlito Quisimorio And Deeming Requests For Admissions Admitted; Separate Statement;
rulings.Rulings: Matter on calendar for Thursday, September 13, 2007. 2) Trustee Zosima Dizon's motion to compel further responses to form interrogatories and for an order to deem certain matters admitted as to trust contestant Carlito Quismorio is granted in part and denied in part. The Court has considered the late-filed opposition. The motion is granted as to the form interrogatories. The motion is denied as to the requests for admission as responses were served. Trust contestant is ordered to provide complete verified responses without objection within 15 days of notice of this order. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $540 are to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. = (610/BEC)
